experience.title: Softnotik aps
experience.description: Working on MinForening, a comprehensive administration platform for associations, utilizing React and Blazor for frontend development, and .NET with Entity Framework Core for backend services.
bullets: Developed and maintained features for MinForening, enhancing user experience and functionality.
Collaborated with a team of developers to implement new modules and optimize existing codebase.
Utilized React and Blazor to create responsive and interactive user interfaces.
Implemented backend services using .NET and Entity Framework Core, ensuring efficient data management and performance.
